summary: Recent updates to the media encoders in Firefox introduced the use of **MOZ_LOG_FMT**, a standardized logging format for enhancing the development and debugging experience. This change allows developers to track the performance and behavior of media encoding processes more efficiently, which is crucial for technologies like WebRTC, responsible for real-time communication. While users may not notice any visible change, this improvement is significant for maintaining and optimizing the quality of media features in Firefox moving forward.
